NKJV.1: Oh, give thanks to the LORD, for He is good! For His mercy endures forever.
NKJV.2: Oh, give thanks to the God of gods! For His mercy endures forever.
NKJV.3: Oh, give thanks to the Lord of lords! For His mercy endures forever:
NKJV.4: To Him who alone does great wonders, For His mercy endures forever;
NKJV.5: To Him who by wisdom made the heavens, For His mercy endures forever;
NKJV.6: To Him who laid out the earth above the waters, For His mercy endures forever;
NKJV.7: To Him who made great lights, For His mercy endures forever—
NKJV.8: The sun to rule by day, For His mercy endures forever;
NKJV.9: The moon and stars to rule by night, For His mercy endures forever.
NKJV.10: To Him who struck Egypt in their firstborn, For His mercy endures forever;
NKJV.11: And brought out Israel from among them, For His mercy endures forever;
NKJV.12: With a strong hand, and with an outstretched arm, For His mercy endures forever;
NKJV.13: To Him who divided the Red Sea in two, For His mercy endures forever;
NKJV.14: And made Israel pass through the midst of it, For His mercy endures forever;
NKJV.15: But overthrew Pharaoh and his army in the Red Sea, For His mercy endures forever;
NKJV.16: To Him who led His people through the wilderness, For His mercy endures forever;
NKJV.17: To Him who struck down great kings, For His mercy endures forever;
NKJV.18: And slew famous kings, For His mercy endures forever—
NKJV.19: Sihon king of the Amorites, For His mercy endures forever;
NKJV.20: And Og king of Bashan, For His mercy endures forever—
NKJV.21: And gave their land as a heritage, For His mercy endures forever;
NKJV.22: A heritage to Israel His servant, For His mercy endures forever.
NKJV.23: Who remembered us in our lowly state, For His mercy endures forever;
NKJV.24: And rescued us from our enemies, For His mercy endures forever;
NKJV.25: Who gives food to all flesh, For His mercy endures forever.
NKJV.26: Oh, give thanks to the God of heaven! For His mercy endures forever.

KJV.1: O give thanks<S>3034</S> unto the LORD<S>3068</S>; for he is good<S>2896</S>: for his mercy<S>2617</S> endureth for ever<S>5769</S>.

KJV.10: To him that smote<S>5221</S> Egypt<S>4714</S> in their firstborn<S>1060</S>: for his mercy<S>2617</S> endureth for ever<S>5769</S>:

KJV.12: With a strong<S>2389</S> hand<S>3027</S>, and with a stretched out<S>5186</S> arm<S>2220</S>: for his mercy<S>2617</S> endureth for ever<S>5769</S>.
KJV.13: To him which divided<S>1504</S> the Red<S>5488</S> sea<S>3220</S> into parts<S>1506</S>: for his mercy<S>2617</S> endureth for ever<S>5769</S>:
KJV.14: And made Israel<S>3478</S> to pass through<S>5674</S> the midst<S>8432</S> of it: for his mercy<S>2617</S> endureth for ever<S>5769</S>:
KJV.15: But overthrew<S>5287</S> Pharaoh<S>6547</S> and his host<S>2428</S> in the Red<S>5488</S> sea<S>3220</S>: for his mercy<S>2617</S> endureth for ever<S>5769</S>. <sup>overthrew: Heb. shaked off</sup>
KJV.16: To him which led<S>3212</S> his people<S>5971</S> through the wilderness<S>4057</S>: for his mercy<S>2617</S> endureth for ever<S>5769</S>.
KJV.17: To him which smote<S>5221</S> great<S>1419</S> kings<S>4428</S>: for his mercy<S>2617</S> endureth for ever<S>5769</S>:
KJV.18: And slew<S>2026</S> famous<S>117</S> kings<S>4428</S>: for his mercy<S>2617</S> endureth for ever<S>5769</S>:
KJV.19: Sihon<S>5511</S> king<S>4428</S> of the Amorites<S>567</S>: for his mercy<S>2617</S> endureth for ever<S>5769</S>:
KJV.20: And Og<S>5747</S> the king<S>4428</S> of Bashan<S>1316</S>: for his mercy<S>2617</S> endureth for ever<S>5769</S>:
KJV.21: And gave<S>5414</S> their land<S>776</S> for an heritage<S>5159</S>: for his mercy<S>2617</S> endureth for ever<S>5769</S>:

KJV.25: Who giveth<S>5414</S> food<S>3899</S> to all flesh<S>1320</S>: for his mercy<S>2617</S> endureth for ever<S>5769</S>.
KJV.26: O give thanks<S>3034</S> unto the God<S>410</S> of heaven<S>8064</S>: for his mercy<S>2617</S> endureth for ever<S>5769</S>.

ESV.1: Give thanks to the LORD, for he is good, for his steadfast love endures forever.
ESV.2: Give thanks to the God of gods, for his steadfast love endures forever.
ESV.3: Give thanks to the Lord of lords, for his steadfast love endures forever;
ESV.4: to him who alone does great wonders, for his steadfast love endures forever;
ESV.5: to him who by understanding made the heavens, for his steadfast love endures forever;
ESV.6: to him who spread out the earth above the waters, for his steadfast love endures forever;
ESV.7: to him who made the great lights, for his steadfast love endures forever;
ESV.8: the sun to rule over the day, for his steadfast love endures forever;
ESV.9: the moon and stars to rule over the night, for his steadfast love endures forever;
ESV.10: to him who struck down the firstborn of Egypt, for his steadfast love endures forever;
ESV.11: and brought Israel out from among them, for his steadfast love endures forever;
ESV.12: with a strong hand and an outstretched arm, for his steadfast love endures forever;
ESV.13: to him who divided the Red Sea in two, for his steadfast love endures forever;
ESV.14: and made Israel pass through the midst of it, for his steadfast love endures forever;
ESV.15: but overthrew  Pharaoh and his host in the Red Sea, for his steadfast love endures forever;
ESV.16: to him who led his people through the wilderness, for his steadfast love endures forever;
ESV.17: to him who struck down great kings, for his steadfast love endures forever;
ESV.18: and killed mighty kings, for his steadfast love endures forever;
ESV.19: Sihon, king of the Amorites, for his steadfast love endures forever;
ESV.20: and Og, king of Bashan, for his steadfast love endures forever;
ESV.21: and gave their land as a heritage, for his steadfast love endures forever;
ESV.22: a heritage to Israel his servant, for his steadfast love endures forever.
ESV.23: It is he who remembered us in our low estate, for his steadfast love endures forever;
ESV.24: and rescued us from our foes, for his steadfast love endures forever;
ESV.25: he who gives food to all flesh, for his steadfast love endures forever.
ESV.26: Give thanks to the God of heaven, for his steadfast love endures forever.

NASB.1: Give thanks to the LORD, for He is good, For His lovingkindness is everlasting.
NASB.2: Give thanks to the God of gods, For His lovingkindness is everlasting.
NASB.3: Give thanks to the Lord of lords, For His lovingkindness is everlasting.
NASB.4: To Him who alone does great wonders, For His lovingkindness is everlasting;
NASB.5: To Him who made the heavens with skill, For His lovingkindness is everlasting;
NASB.6: To Him who spread out the earth above the waters, For His lovingkindness is everlasting;
NASB.7: To Him who made [the] great lights, For His lovingkindness is everlasting:
NASB.8: The sun to rule by day, For His lovingkindness is everlasting,
NASB.9: The moon and stars to rule by night, For His lovingkindness is everlasting.
NASB.10: To Him who smote the Egyptians in their firstborn, For His lovingkindness is everlasting,
NASB.11: And brought Israel out from their midst, For His lovingkindness is everlasting,
NASB.12: With a strong hand and an outstretched arm, For His lovingkindness is everlasting.
NASB.13: To Him who divided the Red Sea asunder, For His lovingkindness is everlasting,
NASB.14: And made Israel pass through the midst of it, For His lovingkindness is everlasting;
NASB.15: But He overthrew Pharaoh and his army in the Red Sea, For His lovingkindness is everlasting.
NASB.16: To Him who led His people through the wilderness, For His lovingkindness is everlasting;
NASB.17: To Him who smote great kings, For His lovingkindness is everlasting,
NASB.18: And slew mighty kings, For His lovingkindness is everlasting:
NASB.19: Sihon, king of the Amorites, For His lovingkindness is everlasting,
NASB.20: And Og, king of Bashan, For His lovingkindness is everlasting,
NASB.21: And gave their land as a heritage, For His lovingkindness is everlasting,
NASB.22: Even a heritage to Israel His servant, For His lovingkindness is everlasting.
NASB.23: Who remembered us in our low estate, For His lovingkindness is everlasting,
NASB.24: And has rescued us from our adversaries, For His lovingkindness is everlasting;
NASB.25: Who gives food to all flesh, For His lovingkindness is everlasting.
NASB.26: Give thanks to the God of heaven, For His lovingkindness is everlasting.

NLT.1:
Give thanks to the LORD, for he is good!
— His faithful love endures forever.
NLT.2:
Give thanks to the God of gods.
— His faithful love endures forever.
NLT.3:
Give thanks to the Lord of lords.
— His faithful love endures forever.
NLT.4:
Give thanks to him who alone does mighty miracles.
— His faithful love endures forever.
NLT.5:
Give thanks to him who made the heavens so skillfully.
— His faithful love endures forever.
NLT.6:
Give thanks to him who placed the earth among the waters.
— His faithful love endures forever.
NLT.7:
Give thanks to him who made the heavenly lights —
— His faithful love endures forever.
NLT.8:
the sun to rule the day,
— His faithful love endures forever.
NLT.9:
and the moon and stars to rule the night.
— His faithful love endures forever.
NLT.10:
Give thanks to him who killed the firstborn of Egypt.
— His faithful love endures forever.
NLT.11:
He brought Israel out of Egypt.
— His faithful love endures forever.
NLT.12:
He acted with a strong hand and powerful arm.
— His faithful love endures forever.
NLT.13:
Give thanks to him who parted the Red Sea.
— His faithful love endures forever.
NLT.14:
He led Israel safely through,
— His faithful love endures forever.
NLT.15:
but he hurled Pharaoh and his army into the Red Sea.
— His faithful love endures forever.
NLT.16:
Give thanks to him who led his people through the wilderness.
— His faithful love endures forever.
NLT.17:
Give thanks to him who struck down mighty kings.
— His faithful love endures forever.
NLT.18:
He killed powerful kings —
— His faithful love endures forever.
NLT.19:
Sihon king of the Amorites,
— His faithful love endures forever.
NLT.20:
and Og king of Bashan.
— His faithful love endures forever.
NLT.21:
God gave the land of these kings as an inheritance —
— His faithful love endures forever.
NLT.22:
a special possession to his servant Israel.
— His faithful love endures forever.
NLT.23:
He remembered us in our weakness.
— His faithful love endures forever.
NLT.24:
He saved us from our enemies.
— His faithful love endures forever.
NLT.25:
He gives food to every living thing.
— His faithful love endures forever.
NLT.26:
Give thanks to the God of heaven.
— His faithful love endures forever.

WEB.1: Give thanks to Yahweh, for he is good; for his loving kindness endures forever.
WEB.2: Give thanks to the God of gods; for his loving kindness endures forever.
WEB.3: Give thanks to the Lord of lords; for his loving kindness endures forever:
WEB.4: To him who alone does great wonders; for his loving kindness endures forever:
WEB.5: To him who by understanding made the heavens; for his loving kindness endures forever:
WEB.6: To him who spread out the earth above the waters; for his loving kindness endures forever:
WEB.7: To him who made the great lights; for his loving kindness endures forever:
WEB.8: The sun to rule by day; for his loving kindness endures forever;
WEB.9: The moon and stars to rule by night; for his loving kindness endures forever:
WEB.10: To him who struck down the Egyptian firstborn; for his loving kindness endures forever;
WEB.11: And brought out Israel from among them; for his loving kindness endures forever;
WEB.12: With a strong hand, and with an outstretched arm; for his loving kindness endures forever:
WEB.13: To him who divided the Red Sea apart; for his loving kindness endures forever;
WEB.14: And made Israel to pass through the middle of it; for his loving kindness endures forever;
WEB.15: But overthrew Pharaoh and his army in the Red Sea; for his loving kindness endures forever:
WEB.16: To him who led his people through the wilderness; for his loving kindness endures forever:
WEB.17: To him who struck great kings; for his loving kindness endures forever;
WEB.18: And killed mighty kings; for his loving kindness endures forever:
WEB.19: Sihon king of the Amorites; for his loving kindness endures forever;
WEB.20: Og king of Bashan; for his loving kindness endures forever;
WEB.21: And gave their land as an inheritance; for his loving kindness endures forever;
WEB.22: Even a heritage to Israel his servant; for his loving kindness endures forever:
WEB.23: Who remembered us in our low estate; for his loving kindness endures forever;
WEB.24: And has delivered us from our adversaries; for his loving kindness endures forever:
WEB.25: Who gives food to every creature; for his loving kindness endures forever.
WEB.26: Oh give thanks to the God of heaven; for his loving kindness endures forever.

CSB17.1: Give thanks to the LORD, for he is good. ⓔ His faithful love endures forever.
CSB17.2: Give thanks to the God of gods. His faithful love endures forever.
CSB17.3: Give thanks to the Lord of lords. ⓕ His faithful love endures forever.
CSB17.4: He alone does great wonders. ⓖ His faithful love endures forever.
CSB17.5: He made the heavens skillfully. ⓗ His faithful love endures forever.
CSB17.6: He spread the land on the waters. ⓘ His faithful love endures forever.
CSB17.7: He made the great lights: ⓙ His faithful love endures forever.
CSB17.8: the sun to rule by day, His faithful love endures forever.
CSB17.9: the moon and stars to rule by night. ⓚ His faithful love endures forever.
CSB17.10: He struck the firstborn of the Egyptians ⓛ His faithful love endures forever.
CSB17.11: and brought Israel out from among them His faithful love endures forever.
CSB17.12: with a strong hand and outstretched arm. ⓜ His faithful love endures forever.
CSB17.13: He divided the Red Sea ⓝ His faithful love endures forever.
CSB17.14: and led Israel through, ⓐ His faithful love endures forever.
CSB17.15: but hurled Pharaoh and his army into the Red Sea. ⓑ His faithful love endures forever.
CSB17.16: He led his people in the wilderness. ⓒ His faithful love endures forever.
CSB17.17: He struck down great kings His faithful love endures forever.
CSB17.18: and slaughtered famous kings — His faithful love endures forever.
CSB17.19: Sihon king of the Amorites His faithful love endures forever.
CSB17.20: and Og king of Bashan — His faithful love endures forever.
CSB17.21: and gave their land as an inheritance, His faithful love endures forever.
CSB17.22: an inheritance to Israel his servant. ⓓ His faithful love endures forever.
CSB17.23: He remembered us in our humiliation ⓔ His faithful love endures forever.
CSB17.24: and rescued us from our foes. ⓕ His faithful love endures forever.
CSB17.25: He gives food to every creature. ⓖ His faithful love endures forever.
CSB17.26: Give thanks to the God of heaven! ⓗ His faithful love endures forever.

AMP.1:
Give thanks to the LORD, for He is good;
For His lovingkindness (graciousness, mercy, compassion) endures forever.
AMP.2:
Give thanks to the God of gods,
For His lovingkindness endures forever.
AMP.3:
Give thanks to the Lord of lords,
For His lovingkindness endures forever.
AMP.4:
To Him who alone does great wonders,
For His lovingkindness endures forever;
AMP.5:
To Him who made the heavens with skill,
For His lovingkindness endures forever;
AMP.6:
To Him who stretched out the earth upon the waters,
For His lovingkindness endures forever;
AMP.7:
To Him who made the great lights,
For His lovingkindness endures forever;
AMP.8:
The sun to rule over the day,
For His lovingkindness endures forever;
AMP.9:
The moon and stars to rule by night,
For His lovingkindness endures forever;
AMP.10:
To Him who struck the firstborn of Egypt,
For His lovingkindness endures forever;
AMP.11:
And brought Israel out from among them,
For His lovingkindness endures forever;
AMP.12:
With a strong hand and with an outstretched arm,
For His lovingkindness endures forever;
AMP.13:
To Him who divided the Red Sea into parts,
For His lovingkindness endures forever;
AMP.14:
And made Israel pass through the midst of it,
For His lovingkindness endures forever;
AMP.15:
But tossed Pharaoh and his army into the Red Sea,
For His lovingkindness endures forever;
AMP.16:
To Him who led His people through the wilderness,
For His lovingkindness endures forever;
AMP.17:
To Him who struck down great kings,
For His lovingkindness endures forever;
AMP.18:
And killed mighty kings,
For His lovingkindness endures forever;
AMP.19:
Sihon, king of the Amorites,
For His lovingkindness endures forever;
AMP.20:
And Og, king of Bashan,
For His lovingkindness endures forever;
AMP.21:
And gave their land as a heritage,
For His lovingkindness endures forever;
AMP.22:
Even a heritage to Israel His servant,
For His lovingkindness endures forever;
AMP.23:
Who [faithfully] remembered us in our lowly condition,
For His lovingkindness endures forever;
AMP.24:
And has rescued us from our enemies,
For His lovingkindness endures forever;
AMP.25:
Who gives food to all flesh,
For His lovingkindness endures forever;
AMP.26:
Give thanks to the God of heaven,
For His lovingkindness (graciousness, mercy, compassion) endures forever.

MSG.1:
Thank God! He deserves your thanks.
His love never quits.
MSG.2:
Thank the God of all gods,
His love never quits.
MSG.3:
Thank the Lord of all lords.
His love never quits.
MSG.4:
Thank the miracle-working God,
His love never quits.
MSG.5:
The God whose skill formed the cosmos,
His love never quits.
MSG.6:
The God who laid out earth on ocean foundations,
His love never quits.
MSG.7:
The God who filled the skies with light,
His love never quits.
MSG.8:
The sun to watch over the day,
His love never quits.
MSG.9:
Moon and stars as guardians of the night,
His love never quits.
MSG.10:
The God who struck down the Egyptian firstborn,
His love never quits.
MSG.11:
And rescued Israel from Egypt's oppression,
His love never quits.
MSG.12:
Took Israel in hand with his powerful hand,
His love never quits.
MSG.13:
Split the Red Sea right in half,
His love never quits.
MSG.14:
Led Israel right through the middle,
His love never quits.
MSG.15:
Dumped Pharaoh and his army in the sea,
His love never quits.
MSG.16:
The God who marched his people through the desert,
His love never quits.
MSG.17:
Smashed huge kingdoms right and left,
His love never quits.
MSG.18:
Struck down the famous kings,
His love never quits.
MSG.19:
Struck Sihon the Amorite king,
His love never quits.
MSG.20:
Struck Og the Bashanite king,
His love never quits.
MSG.21:
Then distributed their land as booty,
His love never quits.
MSG.22:
Handed the land over to Israel.
His love never quits.
MSG.23:
God remembered us when we were down,
His love never quits.
MSG.24:
Rescued us from the trampling boot,
His love never quits.
MSG.25:
Takes care of everyone in time of need.
His love never quits.
MSG.26:
Thank God, who did it all!
His love never quits.

NIV.1:
Psalm 136
Give thanks to the Lord, for he is good.
His love endures forever.
NIV.2:
Give thanks to the God of gods.
His love endures forever.
NIV.3:
Give thanks to the Lord of lords:
His love endures forever.
NIV.4:
to him who alone does great wonders,
His love endures forever.
NIV.5:
who by his understanding made the heavens,
His love endures forever.
NIV.6:
who spread out the earth upon the waters,
His love endures forever.
NIV.7:
who made the great lights—
His love endures forever.
NIV.8:
the sun to govern the day,
His love endures forever.
NIV.9:
the moon and stars to govern the night;
His love endures forever.
NIV.10:
to him who struck down the firstborn of Egypt
His love endures forever.
NIV.11:
and brought Israel out from among them
His love endures forever.
NIV.12:
with a mighty hand and outstretched arm;
His love endures forever.
NIV.13:
to him who divided the Red Sea asunder
His love endures forever.
NIV.14:
and brought Israel through the midst of it,
His love endures forever.
NIV.15:
but swept Pharaoh and his army into the Red Sea;
His love endures forever.
NIV.16:
to him who led his people through the desert,
His love endures forever.
NIV.17:
who struck down great kings,
His love endures forever.
NIV.18:
and killed mighty kings—
His love endures forever.
NIV.19:
Sihon king of the Amorites
His love endures forever.
NIV.20:
and Og king of Bashan—
His love endures forever.
NIV.21:
and gave their land as an inheritance,
His love endures forever.
NIV.22:
an inheritance to his servant Israel;
His love endures forever.
NIV.23:
to the One who remembered us in our low estate
His love endures forever.
NIV.24:
and freed us from our enemies,
His love endures forever.
NIV.25:
and who gives food to every creature.
His love endures forever.
NIV.26:
Give thanks to the God of heaven.
His love endures forever.

for his steadfast love endures forever.

O give thanks to the God of gods,
for his steadfast love endures forever.

who alone does great wonders,

for his steadfast love endures forever;
NRSVCE.17:
who struck down great kings,
for his steadfast love endures forever;
NRSVCE.18:
and killed famous kings,
for his steadfast love endures forever;
NRSVCE.19:
Sihon, king of the Amorites,
for his steadfast love endures forever;
NRSVCE.20:
and Og, king of Bashan,
for his steadfast love endures forever;
NRSVCE.21:
and gave their land as a heritage,
for his steadfast love endures forever;
NRSVCE.22:
a heritage to his servant Israel,
for his steadfast love endures forever.
NRSVCE.23:
It is he who remembered us in our low estate,
for his steadfast love endures forever;
NRSVCE.24:
and rescued us from our foes,
for his steadfast love endures forever;
NRSVCE.25:
who gives food to all flesh,
for his steadfast love endures forever.
NRSVCE.26:
O give thanks to the God of heaven,
for his steadfast love endures forever.

NET.1: Give thanks to the LORD, for he is good, for his loyal love endures.
NET.2: Give thanks to the God of gods, for his loyal love endures.
NET.3: Give thanks to the Lord of lords, for his loyal love endures,
NET.4: to the one who performs magnificent, amazing deeds all by himself, for his loyal love endures,
NET.5: to the one who used wisdom to make the heavens, for his loyal love endures,
NET.6: to the one who spread out the earth over the water, for his loyal love endures,
NET.7: to the one who made the great lights, for his loyal love endures,
NET.8: the sun to rule by day, for his loyal love endures,
NET.9: the moon and stars to rule by night, for his loyal love endures,
NET.10: to the one who struck down the firstborn of Egypt, for his loyal love endures,
NET.11: and led Israel out from their midst, for his loyal love endures,
NET.12: with a strong hand and an outstretched arm, for his loyal love endures,
NET.13: to the one who divided the Red Sea in two, for his loyal love endures,
NET.14: and led Israel through its midst, for his loyal love endures,
NET.15: and tossed Pharaoh and his army into the Red Sea, for his loyal love endures,
NET.16: to the one who led his people through the wilderness, for his loyal love endures,
NET.17: to the one who struck down great kings, for his loyal love endures,
NET.18: and killed powerful kings, for his loyal love endures,
NET.19: Sihon, king of the Amorites, for his loyal love endures,
NET.20: Og, king of Bashan, for his loyal love endures,
NET.21: and gave their land as an inheritance, for his loyal love endures,
NET.22: as an inheritance to Israel his servant, for his loyal love endures,
NET.23: to the one who remembered us when we were down, for his loyal love endures,
NET.24: and snatched us away from our enemies, for his loyal love endures,
NET.25: to the one who gives food to all living things, for his loyal love endures.
NET.26: Give thanks to the God of heaven, for his loyal love endures!
